content: the ssot remote sync epic lives at .nott/ssot.md/epics/epic-ssot-remote-sync.md
conflict resolution for remote sync happens in resolve.rs at the merge boundary
the compose invariants document pins the canonical infra layout
outbox writes are staged before dispatch so a crash never loses a queued sync
the jwt guard on the mcp surface fails closed with 401 when the token is absent
the runner listener env file holds the github token on the dev box

session start injects a digest projection
the digest carries counts and newest headlines
it is sized for context assembly
anchor: digest: one-call compact store projection sized for session-start injection

content: the store persists the capsule as canonical json in a single sqlite file, derives four filter columns from it at append time, and re-validates the canonical bytes through the capsule funnel on every read so corruption surfaces typed instead of drifting silently
